{{Quote|Bah! Still believe those bedtime stories about these do-goody sorcerers? Let Hoonta of the Chattza Clan show you how things are done! Not even his precious Force can save him now!|Hoonta|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 9">[[Star Wars (1998) 9|''Star Wars'' (1998) 9]]</ref>}}
'''Hoonta''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] henchman of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. A member of the [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza]] clan, he was killed when he, along with a group of other henchmen, attempted to assassinate the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] during a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] ride through the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]]. The only one brave enough to face the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], Hoonta boasted that he did not fear his "[[The Force/Legends|magic]]," but he was quickly dispatched by the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] Jedi. Immediately before bisecting the unfortunate mercenary, Ki-Adi-Mundi noted that his unfortunate lack of faith in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] was only matched by his lack of skill in combat.
